product.name: ArNeo File
product.familyDescriptorPl: Fluorescencyjne dzianiny hi-vis na odzież ostrzegawczą
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fluorescent hi-vis knits for safety wear
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
product.titleDescriptor: High Visible Mesh Fabric for Safety Jacket
product.specLine: 120 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible, Mesh Knit Fabric
descriptions: ArNeo File is 100% polyester texturised, 120 g/m² warp knitted neon colored mesh fabric for safety jackets. It is the most popular mesh fabric for safety jacket usage.
ArNeo File is EN ISO 20471 certified.
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
High Visible Mesh Fabric for Safety Jacket
120 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible, Mesh Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary end use is stated; the product is exclusively positioned as a safety jacket hi-vis mesh fabric.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Safety jackets are a narrower, explicitly certified hi-vis application, which is more specific than general workwear.
